entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: Safar Waqti AI loogu talagalay waxbarasho taariikh

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Safar Waqti AI loogu talagalay waxbarasho taariikh waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Receive temporal passport, cad travel advisory, kadib sahmi gaar ah taariikhi society iyada oo loo marayo scene, khariidad, timeline, dad, xeerarka, inventory, iyo caddeyn.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Tababaraha Qoraalka AI loogu talagalay maqaallo, sheekooyin, iyo qoraallo qabyo ah oo cad waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Improve maqaallo, sheekooyin, emails, iyo doodo leh jawaab-celin bartilmaameed ah taas keeps codkaaga oo aan lumin.
Jawaab-celin qoraal AI oo ardayda ah

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI qoraal jawaab-celin taas keeps codkaaga oo aan lumin.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: Dhammaan bilowga prompts-ka waxbarasho AI ee inspir

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Dhammaan wada-sheekaysiyada waxbarasho AI ee dadweynaha hal meel oo cad.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: wehel waxbarasho AI waa gudaha ma pretend si noqo magic authority. taas waa gudaha ma erase uncertainty, beddel macallimiinta, ama train ardayda si koobiye jawaabo. ugu fiican systems waa daacad ah ku saabsan limits iyo cad ku saabsan difference u dhexeeya caawin iyo handoff.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: elektaroonik ama jireed saxiix ee qof la oggolaaday si act ku behalf ee owner ee copyright’s interest; description ee copyrighted work taas aad sheegasho leh been infringed, including URL (i.e., web bog address) ee location halkee copyrighted work exists ama koobiye ee copyrighted work; Identification ee URL ama other gaar ah location ku adeeg halkee material taas aad sheegasho waa infringing waa located; kaaga address, telephone number, iyo email address; statement by aad taas aad hayso good faith belief taas disputed isticmaal waa ma la oggolaaday by milkiilaha xuquuqda daabacaadda, its agent, ama sharci; statement by aad, made under penalty ee perjury, taas above macluumaad gudaha kaaga ogeysiis waa accurate iyo taas aad waa milkiilaha xuquuqda daabacaadda ama la oggolaaday si act ku milkiilaha xuquuqda daabacaadda’s behalf.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: kasta tartamo, abaalmarinno ama other xayeysiisyo (collectively, “xayeysiisyo”) made la heli karo iyada oo loo marayo adeeg waxaa laga yaabaa noqo governed by xeerarka taas waa separate ka yimid kuwan Shuruudaha Adeegga. haddii aad participate gudaha kasta xayeysiisyo, please dib-u-eegis applicable xeerarka as well as keenna siyaasadda asturnaanta. haddii xeerarka loogu talagalay Promotion conflict leh kuwan Shuruudaha Adeegga, Promotion xeerarka wuu apply.

Apply the idea to a new example.

waa xarumaha maaddooyinka la tusi karo raadinta?

entries.value: waa maqaallo ku xiran si live AI waxbarasho tools?

entries.value: waa kuwan pages saying inspir beddelaa kasta waxbarasho platform?

entries.value: waa kuwan pages written only loogu talagalay matoorrada raadinta?

entries.value: waa kuwan Prompts just loogu talagalay ChatGPT?

entries.value: waa kuwan dhab ah bogag dadweyne ama just app screens?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: waa kuwan hab-socodyo bilaash si isku day?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Dood labada dhinacba oo fiiji fikirkaaga

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Hagaha Qiimaynta Farshaxanka qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Sahmi artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, iyo waxa makes image powerful.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hagaha Qiimaynta Farshaxanka qaab waxbarasho AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Hagaha Qiimaynta Farshaxanka Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: maqaallo, qaab hagayaal, iyo prompt wareegyo

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: weydii ku saabsan yoolal, waqtiyo kama dambays ah, la heli karo waqti, iyo hadda jira kalsooni.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Weydii su'aal kasta oo ku baro sharraxaad cad, tusaalooyin, su'aalo daba-gal ah, iyo tababaraha AI ee dulqaadka leh.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: weydii dhagaystayaal, metric, risks, iyo sida si ku dar improvement.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: weydii Macallinka code-ka loogu talagalay simplest qaab-fikir, hal tusaale, iyo hal thing beginners often misunderstand.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: weydii hadda jira jadwal, target caado, iyo easiest maalinle version.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: weydii follow-ups, evaluate accuracy iyo kalsooni, correct gaps, iyo retry.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan, hayso arday sharax tallaabada xigta, kadib isticmaal su'aal ama flashcard si hubi whether fikrad stuck.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan, su'aal, ama step hubi ka hor jawaab.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan. Do ma weydii loogu talagalay jawaabta kama dambaysta ah yet.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay faham-qaldan hubi, short retrieval su'aal, ama ka adag tusaale. jawaab ka hor weydiinta AI si correct aad.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Codso sharaxaad ka fudud fikradda ugu liidata.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yar koowaad step rather ka badan jawaab kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay aad u yar koowaad task.

entries.source: Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay mawduuc, heer, ama word list; kadib introduce yar set.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay artwork/style ama provide looking framework.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay assignment names, due dates, effort, iyo hadda jira status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay dhagaystayaal, yool, iyo qoraal qabyo ah status haddii unclear; kadib sii diiradda saaran jawaab-celin.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay author, title, date, publisher, URL, iyo access date marka needed.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay la heli karo waqti, must-do tasks, iyo tamar heer.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay commitment, lammaane/macne, hubi-gudaha frequency, iyo proof.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay domain iyo adkaan, kadib set kiis brief iyo koowaad decision.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay event iyo depth, kadib separate background sababaha ka yimid immediate triggers.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay exam date, syllabus, la heli karo waqti, iyo kalsooni by mawduuc.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Codso shan su’aalood oo isku dara qeexitaanno, tusaalooyin, iyo dhibaatooyin wareejin.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay qaab, waqti limit, iyo dhagaystayaal; kadib begin wareeg tababar.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yool, constraints, iyo desired vibe; kadib bixi varied fikrad set.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yool, timeline, tasks, iyo waxa counts as dhab ah progress.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay grading scale, weights, hadda jira scores, iyo target.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay group size, yool, duration, iyo hubi-gudaha cadence.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay tilmaamo, hubinno, iyo jawaab-celin ka hor weydiinta loogu talagalay finished jawaab.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Codso tilmaamo, hubinno, jawaab-celin, iyo qorshayaal waxbarasho oo fikirka ku haya ardayga.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay luqad, yool, iyo code/qalad haddii relevant.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay luqad, arday heer, iyo xaalad; kadib bilow gudaha character.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay material, waqti kama dambays ah, iyo prior kalsooni.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal revision priority, ma finished replacement.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal yar task ka hor weydiinta loogu talagalay jawaab.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal structural priority halkii ee full rewrite.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay hal-fikrad cards leh tilmaamo iyo caadi ah dabinnada.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay outcome, duration, distractions, iyo starting state.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay place ama theme, kadib orient leh location, scale, iyo key features.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay prerequisites, fudud model, tusaalooyin, iyo caadi ah faham-qaldan.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yoolka cilmi-baarista, heer, iyo ilo la heli karo.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay door, dhagaystayaal, iyo background; kadib run koowaad su'aal.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay il material iyo pair type.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay il material ama mawduuc iyo target adkaan.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay il material, mawduuc, iyo target detail haddii missing.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay structure, caddeyn, iyo clarity jawaab-celin inta keeping kama dambays qoraal qabyo ah taada.
